message:
test: dedupe property tests and improve assertion robustness

- Remove duplicate test_spinner_view_never_empty (same as test_spinner_view_non_empty_after_ticks)
- Fix test_form_receives_character_input to verify processing via update_calls instead of searching for text in styled output
- Rename test_form_quit_is_detected to test_form_processes_quit_command with clearer assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
